response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced full-stack engineer with genuine systems chops (low-latency DLang services handling millions of requests per second), but the profile misses the role's core minimum qualifications. C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month stint at National Instruments plus a thesis project, far short of the required 8 years, and there is no production cloud compute platform or dedicated technical-leadership track record. The background centers on web/product engineering in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than large-scale cloud infrastructure leadership.
strengths: High-throughput, low-latency systems experience at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic (millions of HTTP requests/sec)
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, testing tools authorship, workshops and mentoring
Broad polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded, including Kubernetes/Docker deployment
concerns: Falls far short of the 8-year C++ requirement (roughly under 1 year of professional C++)
No production cloud compute platform or large-scale distributed infrastructure ownership at platform level
No formal technical-lead role managing cross-team priorities, deadlines, and deliverables
